nasb.text: “Lift up your eyes to the bare heights and see; Where have you not been violated? By the roads you have sat for them Like an Arab in the desert, And you have polluted a land With your harlotry and with your wickedness.

esv.text: Lift up your eyes to the bare heights, and see! Where have you not been ravished? By the waysides you have sat awaiting lovers like an Arab in the wilderness. You have polluted the land with your vile whoredom.

cnv.text: “你向光禿的高岡舉目看看， 哪裡沒有你的淫跡？ 你坐在路邊等候情人， 像阿拉伯人在曠野埋伏一樣。 你以淫亂和邪惡， 把這地玷污了。

ccb.text: “你举目看看那些光秃的高山， 哪里没有被你玷污过呢？ 你坐在路旁等候情郎， 就像旷野的游牧者， 你的淫乱恶行玷污了土地。
